title: Ethiopian Stew with Brie
description: A twist on traditional Ethiopian stews, this recipe incorporates creamy brie cheese for a unique flavor experience. Serve with injera or naan bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, and red bell pepper, and sauté until tender.
Add carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add stew spice blend, and stir to combine.
Add water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, and simmer for 30 minutes.
Stir in sour cream and brie cheese until melted.
Serve hot over injera or naan bread.
